description_long: This is a two-story Craftsman-style house with a prominent front-facing gable roof and a covered porch supported by square columns. The exterior is clad in horizontal blue siding, accented by white trim around the windows, doors, and roof edges. The roof is steeply pitched and shingled in gray, with a central chimney and decorative gable brackets. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement with a centered entryway, flanked by windows with awnings and a small attic window above. The porch has a white balustrade and steps leading up to the main door, while the sides and rear of the house display additional windows and simple detailing. The overall appearance is classic and inviting, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A blue, two-story Craftsman house with a steep gable roof, white trim, and a covered front porch with columns and steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central steps, main entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement with decorative gable.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gable end, two windows with awnings, and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smaller gable, three windows including a round attic window, and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with two windows and the porch extending partially along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with decorative awnings and a central attic window
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door accessed by steps, covered porch with square columns, white balustrade, and decorative gable trim
